Professional monster hunter. White hair, two swords (one for humans, one for monsters), and a terrible habit of taking on side quests while looking for my adopted daughter. I hate portals.

Dragonborn. Specializes in shouting people off mountains, putting buckets on shopkeepers' heads to steal their goods, and exploring endless caves filled with Draugr. I used to be an adventurer like you, until...
Vault dweller/Survivor. Experienced in scavenging the wasteland for bottle caps, drinking irradiated water, and dealing with raiders. Companion is a very good boy (a dog). Power armor certified.

Former police officer/agent. Heavy experience with scarce ammunition, puzzle-solving in absurdly designed mansions or police stations, and shooting zombies. I hate giant mutated pharmaceutical experiments.

Theoretical physicist with a crowbar. Man of few words. Excellent at surviving alien invasions and government cover-ups in a secretive research facility. Highly proficient in pushing anomalous materials into anti-mass spectrometers.
Spectre and starship commander. Specializes in saving the galaxy from ancient synthetic reapers, punching annoying reporters, and romancing alien crew members. 'I should go.'

Former Greek deity of rage. Current occupation: Tired father in the Norse realms. Strong experience in wielding an axe that magically returns to my hand and calling my son 'BOY'. Not a fan of pantheons.
Professional crossover fighter. Capable of knocking iconic characters off a floating platform at high percentages. Items off, Final Destination only. No real plot, just pure competitive violence.
Champion of the rift. Highly experienced in blaming the jungler, destroying enemy nexus, and engaging in extremely toxic chat. Dedicated to pushing lanes and taking objectives.

Heroic strike team member. Specialize in pushing the payload (when my team actually helps), spamming 'I need healing', and using my ultimate ability at the worst possible time. The world could always use more heroes.
Professional athlete. Combining high-speed vehicular acrobatics with a giant ball. Excellent at missing easy goals and spamming 'What a save!' in the chat after my teammate makes a mistake.

Legendary stealth operative. Highly skilled in hiding inside cardboard boxes, smoking cigars to pass time, and repeating the last word of a sentence as a question? A master of CQC and taking down giant bipedal nuclear tanks.
Chosen Undead. Very accustomed to dying repeatedly. Excellent at rolling dodge maneuvers, drinking Estus flasks, and reading vague item descriptions to understand the plot. Praise the sun!
Earthrealm defender/Outworld warrior. Expertise in brutally executing opponents with spine-ripping 'Fatalities' after a perfectly timed announcer says 'FINISH HIM!'. Flawless victory.
Professional stacker. Desperately waiting for the long straight piece to clear four lines at once. Highly stressed by fast-falling colorful blocks. I hear Russian folk music in my sleep.
